mapper.select: /****** SSMS의 SelectTopNRows 명령 스크립트 ******/ SELECT A.SYS_ID , A.FS_NO , C.CST_NM --업체명 , F.CMM_DTL_NM AS CON_PROD --컨설팅 분야 , D.CST_NM AS CON_COM_NM --컨설팅 기관 , B.CON_START_DATE , B.CON_END_DATE , B.CON_TEXT11 , B.CON_TEXT12 , B.CON_TEXT21 , B.CON_TEXT22 , B.CON_TEXT31 , B.CON_TEXT32 , B.CON_TEXT41 , B.CON_TEXT42 , B.CON_TEXT51 , B.CON_TEXT52 , B.CON_TEXT61 , B.CON_TEXT62 , B.CON_TEXT71 , B.CON_TEXT72 , B.CON_TEXT81 , B.CON_TEXT82 , B.CON_TEXT91 , B.CON_TEXT92 , B.CON_TEXT101 , B.CON_TEXT102 , B.CON_COMPLET_DATE , B.CST_MNG_ID , E.USER_NM AS CST_MNG_NM --고객사담당자 , B.CST_MNG_SIG_YN , B.CST_MNG_SIG_DATE , B.FS_MNG_ID , D.USER_NM AS FS_MNG_NM --담당 컨설턴트 , B.FS_MNG_SIG_YN , B.FS_MNG_SIG_DATE , B.STATUS , B.RGSTR_ID , B.RGSTR_DT , B.MDFR_ID , B.MDFR_DT , B.SSMM , #{write_auth} AS WRITE_AUTH FROM CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_MST AS A LEFT JOIN CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_HC_COMPLET AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SYS_ID = B.SYS_ID AND A.FS_NO = B.FS_NO LEFT JOIN CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_CUST AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CST_ID = C.CST_ID LEFT JOIN CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_USER AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.FS_MNG_ID = D.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_USER AS E WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CST_MNG_ID = E.USER_ID LEFT JOIN CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_COMM_DTL AS F WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.PROD_CD = F.CMM_DTL_CD AND F.CMM_CD ='FS017' WHERE A.SYS_ID = #{sys_id} AND A.FS_NO = #{fs_no} AND A.FS_SEQ = #{fs_seq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CESCOFS.dbo.TB_FS_ATTACH(SYS_ID, FS_NO, ATCH_SEQ, ATCH_KN_CD, ATCH_NM, ATCH_SIZE, ATCH_REF_ID , URL, ORG_FILE_NM, SER_FILE_NM, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM ) VALUES( #{sys_id}, #{fs_no}, (SELECT(MAX(A.ATCH_SEQ)+1) from TB_FS_ATTACH A), #{atch_kn_cd}, #{atch_nm}, #{atch_size}, #{atch_ref_id} , #{url}, #{org_file_nm}, #{ser_file_nm}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{ssmm})

insert.selectKey:
SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_MST] where SYS_ID = #{item.sys_id} AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_MST (SYS_ID, FS_NO, FS_SEQ, REG_CHANNEL, CST_ID, RECEIVE_DATE, ISSUE_DATE, BILL_CST_ID, FS_MNG_ID, PROD_CD, PROD_NM, PROD_TP_CD, PROD_TP_CUST_NM, PROD_ITEM, PROD_MAFA_NM, PROD_SER_CD, PROD_UNIT_CD, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT , CST_MNG_ID, TAX_BILL_TP_CD, CONT_ID, CONT_NO, MD_DAY ) VALUES
,
(#{item.sys_id}, #{item.fs_no}, #{item.fs_seq}, #{item.reg_channel}, #{item.cst_id}, #{item.receive_date}, GETDATE(), #{item.bill_cst_id}, #{item.fs_mng_id}, #{item.prod_cd}, #{item.prod_nm}, #{item.prod_tp_cd}, [dbo].[FN_FS_GETSNAME2] ('5', 'FS018', #{item.prod_tp_cd}), '', '', '', #{item.prod_unit_cd}, 'Y', #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE() , #{item.cst_mng_id}, '02', #{item.cont_id}, #{item.cont_no}, #{item.md_day})
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_DTL_MEM] where SYS_ID = #{item.sys_id} AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_DTL_MEM(SYS_ID, FS_NO,FS_CHAT_ID, FS_BILL_MNG_YN, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, FS_CHAT_YN ,FS_CST_ID) VALUES
,
(#{item.sys_id}, #{item.fs_no}, #{item.user_id}, #{item.fs_bill_mng_yn}, #{item.status}, #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.fs_chat_yn} ,#{item.cst_id})
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_ESTMATE] where SYS_ID = #{item.sys_id} AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_ESTMATE(SYS_ID, FS_NO, FS_SEQ, CST_ID, EST_TP_CD, EST_USE_YN, EST_AMT, EST_CHG_DATE, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, EST_SEQ, FS_BILL_YN) VALUES
,
(#{item.sys_id}, #{item.fs_no}, #{item.fs_seq}, #{item.cst_id}, #{item.est_tp_cd}, #{item.est_use_yn}, #{item.est_amt}, GETDATE(), #{item.status}, #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), [dbo].FN_FS_GETSEQUENCE ('TB_FS_ESTMATE',#{item.sys_id},#{item.search_seq}), 'N')
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_HC_MDAY] where SYS_ID = #{item.sys_id} AND FS_NO = #{item.fs_no}
INSERT INTO TB_FS_HC_MDAY(SYS_ID, FS_NO, MD_DAY, CST_MNG_ID, FS_MNG_ID, ATCH_NM, URL, ORG_FILE_NM, SER_FILE_NM, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, MD_STATUS_CD) VALUES
,
(#{item.sys_id}, #{item.fs_no}, #{item.md_day}, #{item.cst_mng_id}, #{item.fs_mng_id}, '', '', '', '', #{item.status}, #{item.rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{item.mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), '01')
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN SELECT -1 as resultcode END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN SELECT 1 as resultcode END

mapper.insert:
SET XACT_ABORT ON BEGIN TRAN
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_DTL_CHAT] where SYS_ID = #{sys_id} AND FS_NO = #{fs_no} AND FS_CHAT_SEQ = 1
INSERT INTO TB_FS_DTL_CHAT(SYS_ID, FS_NO, FS_CHAT_ID, FS_CHAT_SEQ, CONTENTS, FS_STATUS_CD, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM) VALUES(#{sys_id}, #{fs_no}, #{fs_chat_id}, #{fs_chat_seq}, #{contents}, #{fs_status_cd}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), '')
IF @@ERROR <> 0 BEGIN ROLLBACK TRAN END ELSE BEGIN COMMIT TRAN END
